summary: Prettier formatting check failed: one file is not formatted according to the project's Prettier rules.
root_cause: The prettier check failed because packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js is not formatted; the prettier script exited with a non-zero status.

evidence.quote: Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: The CI output explicitly instructs to run yarn prettier-all to fix formatting issues.
This file is listed by the prettier script as needing formatting.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The prettier-check command failed and returned a non-zero exit code, causing the job to fail.
Shows which script was run to perform the prettier check.
Indicates the CI step that invoked the prettier formatting check.

suggested_fix: Run the project's formatting script locally (yarn prettier-all), commit the resulting changes (including packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js), and push the commit so the prettier-check step passes.
